money_flow_summary: Money flows from shippers through freight brokers, carriers, and last-mile operators. AI disrupts coordination and visibility layers — predicting delays, optimizing routes, automating documentation.

opportunities.title: SMB Demand Forecasting & Reorder Automation
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Connects to Shopify/WooCommerce + suppliers. Analyzes 12–24 months sales velocity by SKU, seasonal patterns, lead times. Auto-generates purchase orders when stock hits reorder point. Charge $149–$499/mo. Stockouts cost SMBs 4–8% of annual revenue.
opportunities.moat: Historical sales + inventory data creates proprietary demand model per customer
opportunities.first_step: Build Shopify inventory data connector; implement Prophet forecasting; create demo showing stockout prevention
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI incorporates external signals (weather, social trends, promotional calendars) that simple velocity-based rules miss

competitors.name: Inventory Planner
competitors.weakness: $99–$499/mo but manual reorder triggers; no AI signals integration; basic forecasting

competitors.name: Cin7
competitors.weakness: Full inventory management system; expensive; complex; not focused on demand prediction

competitors.name: Brightpearl
competitors.weakness: Mid-market enterprise ($1k+/mo); over-complex for small Shopify stores

opportunities.gap: Inventory Planner shows forecasts but requires manual decisions. An AI that automatically places purchase orders when predictions hit reorder thresholds — without human approval for routine restocks — is missing.
poc_steps: Export a Shopify store's sales history for 12 months
Run Facebook Prophet forecasting on top 20 SKUs
Show: 'SKU A will stock out in 12 days at current velocity — reorder 200 units now'
Charge $149/mo for the automated alert + PO generation

opportunities.title: Import/Export Compliance Document Automation
opportunities.how_money_is_made: AI handles paperwork nightmare of international trade: auto-generates commercial invoices, packing lists, certificates of origin, customs declarations from order data. Cross-references HTS codes, tariff schedules. Charge $199–$999/mo. Customs brokers charge $150–$500 per shipment.
opportunities.moat: HTS classification database + country-specific rule library creates proprietary accuracy
opportunities.first_step: Build HTS tariff schedule parser + commercial invoice generator; test with 5 Shopify sellers importing from China
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI classifies products into HTS codes and generates compliant customs documentation

competitors.name: Flexport
competitors.weakness: Full freight forwarder; expensive; not DIY; requires account management

competitors.name: Zonos (duties/taxes)
competitors.weakness: Duties calculation only; no document generation; checkout-focused

opportunities.gap: No affordable tool auto-generates all export/import documents from order data AND classifies HTS codes. Every SMB importer either uses a $500/shipment broker or does it manually with errors.
poc_steps: Get HTS code database (free from census.gov)
Build product description → HTS code classifier with Claude
Offer to do 5 free shipment document sets for an Amazon importer
